title: Heap analytics API keys should not be disclosed
description: Heap is a digital insights and analytics platform. API keys authenticate server-side event tracking and data export requests. Exposing keys allows unauthorized event injection and access to user behavior analytics data.
recommendation: Remove Heap API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at heapanalytics.com/app/manage/settings.
impact: Unauthorized event tracking injection, access to user behavior analytics, and potential data manipulation.

checks.message: Heap analytics API key detected. Heap API keys authenticate server-side requests to track user events and properties, identify users and associate events, export raw analytics data, and access user behavior insights. Exposing this key allows unauthorized event injection that corrupts your analytics data. Rotate immediately at heapanalytics.com/app/manage/settings.

Heap environment ID detected in heap.load() call. While app IDs are less sensitive than API keys, exposing them in server-side code may reveal your Heap configuration. Review whether this appears in server-side or client-side context.
